reviews.review_title: Good game Very bad VR port
reviews.review_description:
How did this avoid the "Gallery" section and gain a comfortable rating???

Right from the start, the pop up instructions are right in your face, with no regard for comfort. 

Sky box is just chopped off, like they took their 2d game and just ticked the VR box without any consideration or further amendments. 

The player cam centres on the character at all times which is not very comfortable. Made all the more worse by the fact everything is far too close to your eyes. 

Aliased textures everywhere and it just looks a mess. 

I had this is my wishlist on steam for a long time before I saw they had brought it to gear VR. Disappointed big time. 

A lazy lazy untested VR cash grab. 

Whilst I'm sure the game is Good, I can't recommend this at all. It's the laziest port I've ever come across and is just bad bad bad.

I'm mostly scoring it high because it's a side scroller in VR which we haven't seen a lot of. It's a cute game with a decent mechanic for getting around that at times is a bit more frustrating than I would like, but it's fun.
i use ipega gamepad and i can not past the start page. please fix the gamepad compatibility and add gear vr controller function

Game has missing texture on S8+ andvtje developer does nothing to fix. Instead the developer sells you a broken product. Developer should ve blacklisted drom future development on Oculus store, Developer has poor business ethics.
